styleLock: Supercell-style stylized 3D cartoon (Clash of Clans / Brawl Stars aesthetic): chunky proportions with oversized heads and stubby limbs, exaggerated hand-painted textures, soft painterly shading with a clear primary light source from top-left and warm rim light from the right, thick dark brown outlines about 2-3% of the subject width so the silhouette pops on any background, hand-painted normal maps suggested through the shading (no hard rim lighting, no cel-shading bands), subsurface glow on translucent bits. Palette: warm backyard colony — deep mossy greens (#1d3a1a, #2c4724, #3d7a2c), warm brass and gold accents (#ffd98a, #b97e1c) for highlights, soft earth browns (#3a2512, #6b4420) for outlines and woodwork, never pastel. Top-down 3/4 perspective around 30 degrees. Soft oval drop shadow directly under the subject, about 70% alpha, never a hard cast shadow. 128x128 transparent PNG (RGBA alpha=0 outside the subject), subject fills ~85% of the canvas centered, no background, no ground plane, no grass tufts, no text, no watermark, no border, no caption. Cohesive, production-grade game asset quality.

factions.Bees: lemon yellow with black stripes, gauzy wings
factions.Spiders: deep purple with neon green eyes

units.WorkerAnt: a CHEAP SWARM WORKER: a cheerful worker ant, six legs, NO weapon — instead clearly carrying a TINY GREEN LEAF over its head and a tiny gathering backpack on its back, friendly non-threatening pose, eager helper expression so the player reads CHEAP DISPOSABLE WORKER not soldier
units.SoldierAnt: a FRONTLINE MELEE FIGHTER: a sturdy soldier ant brandishing a SHARP CARVED-WOOD SHORT-SWORD or pointed twig blade in one front leg, oversized mandibles bared, paper crown helmet, classic shield silhouette under the other arm, confident planted combat stance, weapon CLEARLY VISIBLE from the front so the player reads MELEE FIGHTER
units.DirtDigger: an UNDERGROUND BREACHER: a burly ant with COMICALLY OVERSIZED METALLIC DRILL-CLAWS at the front (silver/iron-tipped), small mining goggles over the eyes, a tiny pickaxe slung over the shoulder, dirt clumps clinging to the claws, stubborn determined expression, the drill-claws are the dominant visual element so the player reads TUNNELER/BREACHER
units.Forager: a LOOT SPECIALIST: a fuzzy bee with a BULGING tiny satchel-of-nectar across its body and a small GOLD-COIN charm on the satchel strap, cute fluttery wings, alert opportunistic look-around pose, the satchel is the dominant visual element so the player reads LOOT GATHERER not fighter
units.Wasp: a FLYING SNIPER: a sleek wasp with a LONG NEEDLE-LIKE STINGER tipped with a glowing yellow venom-drop pointing forward, bandit mask over eyes, narrow targeting glare, hovering combat pose, glassy wings mid-beat, the long pointed stinger is the dominant weapon read so the player reads RANGED SNIPER
units.HoneyTank: a HEAVY BRUISER: a round, heavily armored bee draped in thick honeycomb-plate armor, a HEAVY HONEY-DRIPPING BLUDGEON CLUB held in front, helmet of rivets, slow imposing planted stance, the armor mass and the club are the dominant visual elements so the player reads TANK/BRUISER
units.ShieldBeetle: an ANTI-TURRET VANGUARD: a tank-like beetle holding a BIG ROUND RIVETED METAL SHIELD in front of itself (shield clearly visible from the front, taking up much of the silhouette), riveted carapace, helmet, small legs, planted defensive stance, the shield is the dominant visual element so the player reads SHIELD-WALL SOLDIER
units.BombBeetle: a ONE-SHOT SAPPER: a cute beetle carrying a GIANT ROUND DANDELION-PUFF BOMB above its head with a SHORT LIT FUSE sparking, small wide nervous eyes, the bomb is the dominant visual element (bigger than the beetle's head), clearly a one-shot kamikaze unit, FUSE-SPARK glow visible
units.Roller: a MOMENTUM CRUSHER: a muscular beetle rolling a HUGE round dew-droplet WRECKING-BALL in front of itself, the droplet is the dominant visual element (bigger than the beetle), motion-streak suggesting forward momentum, scuffs on the ground beneath, clearly a charging crusher
units.Jumper: a WALL-HOPPING HARASSER: a fuzzy jumping spider mid-jump pose with bent springy back legs and FOREFANGS BARED, a tiny COILED ROPE-GRAPPLE trailing from one leg, alert cat-like agile face, the leaping pose + fangs are the dominant visual elements so the player reads WALL-HOPPER ASSASSIN
units.WebSetter: a CROWD CONTROLLER: a spinner spider actively weaving a GLOWING SILVER WEB-NET BETWEEN ITS FRONT LEGS (the web is the dominant visual element, occupying much of the silhouette), tiny twigs anchoring the corners, focused craft expression, the web-net is the unit's clear weapon
units.Ambusher: a BURST ASSASSIN: a camouflaged spider crouched in a pounce pose with CURVED VENOM-DROPPING FANGS bared and a SMALL CURVED DAGGER held in one front leg, a half-leaf cloak draped over its back, glowing predator eyes, the fangs + dagger are the dominant visual elements so the player reads ASSASSIN
units.FireAnt: a STICKY BURN ATTACKER: a fierce fire ant with a GLOWING ORANGE EMBER CREST on her head, BRIGHT ORANGE FLAMES licking around her mandibles (mandibles tipped with active fire), small lava-cracks on her body, aggressive forward stance, the FIRE around the mouth is the dominant visual element so the player reads BURN/IGNITE
units.Termite: a BUILDING-EATER: a pale termite with HUGE METALLIC WOOD-CHEWING MANDIBLES (chrome/iron-tipped, much bigger than its head) covered in fresh wood splinters, hungry determined expression, gnawed sawdust falling from its mouth, the mandibles are the dominant visual element so the player reads STRUCTURE-CHEWER
units.Dragonfly: a FAST FLYER: a sleek dragonfly scout with a LONG SPEAR-LIKE TAIL-STINGER pointing back and BLURRED FAST GLASSY WINGS (motion blur lines suggesting high speed), narrow head, sleek hunting body, mid-flight pose with body angled forward, the speed-streaks + spear-tail are the dominant visual elements so the player reads FAST AERIAL HUNTER
units.Mantis: a SINGLE-TARGET BURST FIGHTER: a sharp mantis warrior with folded RAPTORIAL FORELEGS held high like dual SCYTHES (the curved blade-arms are the dominant visual element, hooked and razor-edged), leaf-green armor plates on the body, predatory triangular head, poised mid-strike stance, the scythe-arms are unmistakable weapons so the player reads PRECISION BURST
units.Scarab: a SPAWN-ON-DEATH HEAVY: a heavy jeweled scarab beetle with a polished gold-and-emerald shell, a SMALL SPIKED HORN on its forehead, ancient regal look, sturdy planted body, a TINY LIVE MINI-SCARAB peeking out from under one shell-plate so the player reads SPAWNS-WHEN-DEFEATED, the regal shell + horn are the dominant visual elements
units.MiniScarab: a SCARAB OFFSPRING: a tiny cute scarab hatchling with a GLOSSY POLISHED SHELL miniaturized from the parent (same gold-and-emerald palette), nimble little legs mid-charge, a tiny pointed nose-horn, eager forward charge pose, clearly a baby version of the Scarab so the player reads SPAWNED MINION
units.NestSpider: a TUNNEL DEFENDER: a compact spider defender with an extra pair of FANG-LIKE FOREFANGS bared (the fangs are the dominant visual element), eight short bristly legs, tunnel-dwelling alert pose, multiple bright glowing eyes scanning, a tiny SILK-WRAPPED EGG-SAC on its back so the player reads NEST-SPAWNED DEFENDER

walkCycles.WorkerAnt_poseA: a cheerful worker ant carrying a tiny leaf and a tiny backpack, six legs clearly visible. Pose: LEFT legs forward, RIGHT legs back, body leaning slightly forward into the step. Single 128x128 pixel transparent PNG, subject fills ~85% of the canvas, centered, facing viewer at the same 30-degree top-down 3/4 camera as the static sprite. No background, no ground plane, no text.
walkCycles.WorkerAnt_poseB: the leg positions swap — RIGHT legs forward, LEFT legs back, body still leaning slightly forward into the step. The leaf, the backpack, the face, the body, the colors, and the shadow stay exactly as in the reference.
walkCycles.SoldierAnt_poseA: a sturdy soldier ant with oversized mandibles and paper crown, confident marching stance, six legs clearly visible. Pose: LEFT legs forward, RIGHT legs back, mandibles slightly forward, body leaning into the step. Single 128x128 pixel transparent PNG, centered, same 30-degree top-down 3/4 camera as the static sprite. No background, no ground plane, no text.
walkCycles.SoldierAnt_poseB: the leg positions swap — RIGHT legs forward, LEFT legs back, body still leaning into the step. The mandibles, the paper crown, the face, the body, the colors, and the shadow stay exactly as in the reference.
walkCycles.Wasp_poseA: a sleek wasp with bandit mask and stinger, hovering. Pose: wings UP at the top of the wingbeat, body slightly lower, legs tucked. Single 128x128 pixel transparent PNG, centered, same 30-degree top-down 3/4 camera as the static sprite. No background, no ground plane, no text.
walkCycles.Wasp_poseB: the wings swap to the bottom of the wingbeat — wings DOWN and angled slightly outward, the body a hair higher than in the reference. The bandit mask, the stinger, the legs, the face, the colors, and the shadow stay exactly as in the reference.

buildings.QueenChamber: a DEFENSIVE CORE: majestic glowing queen chamber throne-room built into a layered dirt mound, lit from within with a warm glow, throne-like silhouette, ornate brass-rimmed crown symbol visible on the front, clearly the most important structure
buildings.DewCollector: a RESOURCE GENERATOR: a shimmering dew drop suspended in a twig cradle with a small leaf-funnel redirecting water downward, sparkling collector clearly optimized to gather from above, income-producing symbol
buildings.MushroomTurret: a RANGED DEFENSE: a red-capped mushroom turret with a PROMINENT small brass cannon jutting from the stem pointing outward, white spots on the cap, clearly a turret with visible firepower, defensive threat posture
buildings.LeafWall: a STRAIGHT HORIZONTAL FENCE PANEL section of leaf-wall, perfectly flat and rectangular (not tilted, not diagonal, not curved), long axis running left-to-right across the tile like a Clash-of-Clans wall segment, tightly woven chlorophyll bricks with spider-silk seams between them, top and bottom edges parallel and crisp so panels line up edge-to-edge to form a continuous wall, GREEN color emphasis for blocked-path visual
buildings.LeafWallV: a STRAIGHT VERTICAL FENCE PANEL section of leaf-wall, perfectly flat and rectangular (not tilted, not diagonal, not curved), long axis running top-to-bottom across the tile like a Clash-of-Clans wall segment standing upright, tightly woven chlorophyll bricks with spider-silk seams between them, left and right edges parallel and crisp so panels line up edge-to-edge to form a continuous vertical wall, weave bands run perpendicular to the long axis (HORIZONTAL bands across the panel), GREEN color emphasis for blocked-path visual, IDENTICAL palette and styling to the horizontal LeafWall so vertical and horizontal pieces look like the same wall material
buildings.PebbleBunker: a HEAVY DEFENSE: a fortress of stacked river pebbles taller than it is wide, moss in the cracks, SOLID reinforced structure, clearly stronger than leaf-wall, defense-bunker silhouette
buildings.LarvaNursery: a RESOURCE GENERATOR: a cozy domed underground nursery with glowing larva pods visible through several oval windows, nursery entrance hole at the base, clearly a spawner/grower producing units, PURPLE/PINK glow for life-generation
buildings.SugarVault: a STORAGE CORE: a heavy wooden vault door with a GIANT sugar-cube lock visible on the front, ornate brass hinges and trim, sprinkles and sweet-dust floating around, clearly a treasure room and storage container, valuable-goods visual
buildings.TunnelJunction: a CONNECTOR: a clean carved earth tunnel entrance with MULTIPLE distinct paths radiating outward (at least 3 exits visible), junction-hub silhouette showing layer-switching capability, underground connection point
buildings.DungeonTrap: a ONE-SHOT TRAP: a disguised pitfall covered with twigs and fallen leaves, an ominous dark SPIKE trap visible inside, shadow-filled depth showing danger, ambush-trap visual, clearly dangerous surprise
buildings.AcidSpitter: a SPLASH DAMAGE TURRET: a chunky pitcher-plant style acid mortar turret with a SWOLLEN bulb OVERFLOWING with glowing green acid, organic artillery silhouette, clearly a ranged splash weapon, GLOWING GREEN acid threat-color
buildings.SporeTower: an ANTI-AIR TURRET: a tall lookout-tower mushroom with a bulbous PUFFBALL cap at the top ejecting spore clouds upward, tall silhouette emphasizing anti-air role, clearly targets flying threats, SPORE CLOUDS visible
buildings.RootSnare: a ONE-SHOT TRAP: a coiled root trap made from thorny vines and buried hooks forming a SNARE/NOOSE shape, tense coiled silhouette, clearly a root-and-snare freezing trap, TRAP mechanism visible
buildings.HiddenStinger: a HIDDEN TURRET: a stealthy tesla-like stinger turret hidden and camouflaged among LEAVES and twigs, a NEEDLE-THIN cannon barely visible poking through the leaves, hidden ambush-posture, DANGER symbol or spark visible suggesting electrical threat
buildings.SpiderNest: a DEFENDER SPAWNER: a sinister underground spider nest dug into soil with MULTIPLE silk-wrapped egg sacs visible, tunnel openings around the base, clearly a defender-generator producing spider defenders, EGGS and SPIDERS visible
buildings.ThornHedge: a HORIZONTAL REINFORCED BLOCKER: a section of reinforced thorn hedge, long axis running left-to-right across the tile, DENSE brambles with SHARP outward-pointing spikes along the top and bottom edges creating a spiky visual barrier, clearly horizontal so it lines up edge-to-edge with neighbour pieces like a Clash-of-Clans wall, SPIKE visual threat
buildings.ThornHedgeV: a VERTICAL REINFORCED BLOCKER: a section of reinforced thorn hedge standing upright, long axis running top-to-bottom across the tile, DENSE brambles with SHARP outward-pointing spikes along the LEFT and RIGHT edges creating a spiky visual barrier, clearly vertical so it lines up edge-to-edge with neighbour pieces to form a continuous vertical wall, SPIKE visual threat, IDENTICAL palette and styling to the horizontal ThornHedge so vertical and horizontal pieces look like the same hedge material

menuUi.ui-button-primary-bg: a modern, shiny game button background in vibrant coral (#ff6b9d). Polished, glossy surface with a subtle reflective HIGHLIGHT along the top edge suggesting light from above (not a 3D tilt, purely lighting). Soft rounded corners (8px). Minimal 1–2px border in darker coral for definition. Clean, contemporary aesthetic — NO carved wood, NO brass trim, NO ornate details. Smooth gradient from slightly darker at the edges. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, viewed straight from the front with zero perspective, zero isometric tilt. 256x128 pixels transparent PNG, designed for 9-slice scaling. No text, no icons, no logos — just the button surface.
menuUi.ui-button-secondary-bg: a modern, shiny game button background in sky blue (#5bc0de). Polished, glossy surface with a subtle top-edge highlight suggesting premium quality. Soft rounded corners (8px). Minimal border in darker blue (1–2px). Clean, contemporary — NO wooden elements, NO ornate scrollwork. Smooth finish with gentle gradient for depth. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, viewed straight-on with zero perspective, zero tilt. 256x128 pixels transparent PNG, designed for 9-slice scaling. No text, no icons.
menuUi.ui-panel-bg: a modern, shiny game card/panel background in off-white (#f5f5f0). Clean, minimalist surface with NO wood texture, NO ornate borders. Subtle gradient (slightly darker at bottom) for layered depth. Soft rounded corners (12px). Minimal 1px border in earth-tone (#3d5a2a @ 0.2 alpha) or none. Soft drop shadow below (2–4px offset, 8–12px blur, dark @ 0.15 alpha) for elevation. Contemporary, glass-like feel. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, zero perspective, zero tilt. 512x256 pixels transparent PNG, designed for 9-slice scaling. No text, no icons.
menuUi.ui-hud-bg: a modern, shiny horizontal HUD / top-banner background in deep earth-green (#3d5a2a). Polished surface with subtle gradient (slightly darker at top for depth). Minimal ornament — NO ornamental scrollwork, NO brass corners. Soft rounded corners on ends if applicable. Minimal 1px accent stripe in gold (#d4af37) at top or bottom for emphasis. Clean, scannable layout ready for resource pills and UI elements. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, zero perspective. 512x96 pixels transparent PNG, designed to tile horizontally. The middle surface should be smooth and neutral so pills sit cleanly. No text, no icons.
menuUi.ui-title-banner: a modern, shiny decorative title banner in gold (#d4af37) and earth-green (#3d5a2a). Polished, iridescent appearance — suggests premium quality without ornate detail. Soft rounded corners, clean minimalist design. NO ornate scrollwork, NO leaf flourishes, NO wooden backing. Subtle reflection highlight at top suggesting light source. Contemporary, elegant aesthetic. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, viewer directly in front, zero perspective, zero tilt. 512x128 pixels transparent PNG. Empty central area so the game title can be drawn on top. No text.
menuUi.ui-board-tile-surface: a modern, shiny seamless earth-tone ground tile for the game board. Top-down (bird's-eye) view directly from above, zero perspective, zero tilt. Surface includes natural earth materials — soil, moss, small pebbles, organic growth — rendered in contemporary style: polished, slightly iridescent appearance suggesting a treated surface (not raw earth). Color palette: earth-greens (#3d5a2a to #4a6b3a) with warm earth undertones. 128x128 pixels tileable PNG (edges match perfectly for seamless repeat). Soft, subtle lighting with NO hard shadows. No text, no buildings, no characters — just ground.
menuUi.ui-resource-pill-honey: a modern, shiny rounded HUD resource chip in off-white (#f5f5f0) with a polished honey droplet (amber/gold, glossy) at its left end. Minimal border in earth-tone (#3d5a2a @ 0.3 alpha), 1–2px. Soft rounded corners (pill-shaped). Subtle drop shadow below. The droplet should have a reflective highlight suggesting premium, precious quality. Contemporary, clean aesthetic. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, zero perspective. 256x64 pixels transparent PNG, designed for 9-slice scaling. No text, no numbers — just the frame and the droplet.
menuUi.ui-resource-pill-sugar: a modern, shiny rounded HUD resource chip in off-white (#f5f5f0) with a polished sugar crystal (faceted, gem-like, blue-and-white iridescent) at its left end. Minimal earth-tone border (1–2px). Soft rounded corners (pill-shaped). Subtle drop shadow. The crystal should gleam with iridescent highlights. Contemporary, clean. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, zero perspective. 256x64 pixels transparent PNG, designed for 9-slice scaling. No text, no numbers.
menuUi.ui-resource-pill-grubs: a modern, shiny rounded HUD resource chip in off-white (#f5f5f0) with a polished larva/grub pod (gem-like, rose-pink, with glossy highlights and iridescent sheen) at its left end. Minimal earth-tone border (1–2px). Soft rounded corners. Subtle drop shadow. The pod should look precious and polished, not organic/raw. Contemporary, clean. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, zero perspective. 256x64 pixels transparent PNG, designed for 9-slice scaling. No text, no numbers.
menuUi.ui-icon-unit-frame: a modern, shiny circular portrait frame for unit icons. Iridescent border (holographic, with hint of gold #d4af37 and earth-green #3d5a2a) suggesting a premium, polished frame. NO brass ring, NO wooden backing, NO ornate rivets or details. Soft drop shadow. Contemporary, gem-like appearance. Interior has subtle gradient for depth. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, perfectly symmetrical circle, zero perspective. 128x128 pixels transparent PNG with a transparent hole in the center for the portrait. No text, no characters inside — just the empty frame.
menuUi.ui-icon-building-frame: a modern, shiny rounded-square portrait frame for building icons. Iridescent border (holographic gold/earth-green blend) without ornate detail. NO wood, NO brass, NO scrollwork. Polished, contemporary aesthetic. Soft rounded corners (8–10px). Subtle drop shadow. Interior gradient for depth. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, perfectly symmetrical, zero perspective. 128x128 pixels transparent PNG with a transparent hole in the center for the building portrait. No text, no buildings inside — just the empty frame.
menuUi.ui-badge-victory: a modern, shiny end-of-match VICTORY badge in polished gold (#d4af37) and iridescent accents. Shiny, celebratory appearance with subtle glow/reflection. Minimalist shape (no ornate scrollwork, no heavy laurel wreaths). Contemporary, premium feel. Suggest a radiating light effect around the edges. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, perfectly symmetrical, zero perspective. 256x256 pixels transparent PNG centered on the canvas. No text, no characters.
menuUi.ui-badge-defeat: a modern, shiny end-of-match DEFEAT badge in muted earth tones (dark grey-green, browns). Minimalist, clean design — NO cracked stone, NO ornate details. Somber, elegant appearance. Subtle matte finish (less glossy than victory). Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, perfectly symmetrical, zero perspective. 256x256 pixels transparent PNG centered on the canvas. No text.
menuUi.ui-progress-bar-frame: a modern, shiny horizontal progress-bar frame in earth-green (#3d5a2a) with polished gold (#d4af37) accent caps on left and right. NO ornate wooden trough, NO brass scrollwork. Clean, contemporary design. Soft rounded corners on the endcaps. Minimal borders (1px accent stripe @ top + bottom). Transparent hollow channel down the middle (so a fill bar can be drawn behind). Polished, minimal aesthetic. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, zero perspective. 256x48 pixels transparent PNG designed for 9-slice scaling. No text, no numbers, no fill color — just the frame.
menuUi.ui-tooltip-bg: a modern, shiny small tooltip background in off-white (#f5f5f0). Minimal design — NO wooden plank, NO brass nails. Soft rounded corners (6–8px). Subtle drop shadow for elevation. Polished, contemporary look. Minimal 1px border in earth-tone. Clean, scannable surface for text. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, zero perspective. 192x80 pixels transparent PNG designed for 9-slice scaling. No text, no icons.
menuUi.ui-close-button: a modern, shiny circular close button in earth-green (#3d5a2a) with polished gold (#d4af37) accent. Iridescent, gem-like border suggesting premium quality. NO brass, NO wood, NO ornate details. A clean, centered X symbol in contrasting color. Polished, contemporary aesthetic. Soft drop shadow. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, perfectly symmetrical, zero perspective. 96x96 pixels transparent PNG centered on the canvas. No text.
menuUi.ui-card-frame: a modern, shiny portrait-orientation card frame in off-white (#f5f5f0) with iridescent border (gold + earth-green accent) and minimal ornamentation. NO ornate scrollwork, NO wooden backing, NO brass rivets. Contemporary, clean design. Soft rounded corners (12px). Subtle drop shadow. The central area is TRANSPARENT (cut out) so a card-specific portrait and body render behind. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, perfectly symmetrical, zero perspective. 512x720 pixels transparent PNG, designed for 9-slice scaling. No text, no characters, no icons inside the cutout — just the empty frame.
menuUi.ui-logo: the HIVE WARS game logo in modern, shiny style. Polished lettering in iridescent gold (#d4af37) and earth-green (#3d5a2a), NO heavy wooden borders. A small heroic worker ant silhouette on top of the letters holding a tiny leaf banner, rendered in contemporary style. Subtle iridescent glow around the letters suggesting premium quality. Contemporary, elegant aesthetic. The words HIVE WARS clearly readable, stacked on two lines (HIVE on top, WARS below) or side by side. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, perfectly symmetrical, zero perspective. 512x256 pixels transparent PNG centered on the canvas. No extra taglines, no subtitles, no watermarks — just the HIVE WARS wordmark and the ant crest.
menuUi.queen-default: a majestic amber-colored ant queen portrait, stylized 3D cartoon bust from the shoulders up facing forward, oversized head with warm amber carapace and soft painterly shading, subtle crown of brass scrollwork resting on her head, kind intelligent eyes with a soft glow, faint warm rim light from behind, painterly hand-painted look in the Supercell / Clash of Clans style. No text, no watermark.
